nodes.label: Dragit UI Screenshot – Unstaged Changes Panel
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Dragit desktop Git GUI application. Shows a dark-themed macOS window titled 'Dragit' with an 'Unstaged Changes' section (badge count: 5). Lists four modified files with green file icons: README.md (./), models.ts (./src/api), branches.ts (./src/api/queries), and app.tsx (./src). Illustrates the core unstaged-changes workflow and the file-list UI component with file name + path sub-label layout.
